finding: All 7 open issues resolved in one batch: 3 route params wired, 3 orphaned tables given write paths (CRUD, start/end API, event-driven upsert), and dev credentials gated behind env check. 3 new Decision Log entries and 5 Known Gaps checked off in docs/agent.md.
context: Bulk update to docs/agent.md after fullstack-feature-dev specialist resolved issues 1-7 covering missing APIs, unused route params, and hardcoded dev credentials.

finding: Routing bypass during plan execution: the coordinator self-implemented code changes instead of delegating to fullstack-feature-dev. Root cause was threefold: (1) no rule to scan plan content for domain keywords when user says 'implement the plan', (2) no pre-implementation checkpoint to verify delegation before editing files, (3) plan execution strategy was advisory with no enforcement. Fixed by adding 'Pre-Implementation Checkpoint' and 'Plan Execution Rules' sections to subagent-router.mdc, and 'Plan-Driven Delegation' section to delegation-protocol.md.
context: User asked 'why are you not using special skills and subagents for the fixes' after observing the coordinator directly editing TodoView.tsx and TodoList.tsx instead of delegating.
